chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Cr. Transfer Application No.S-38 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 24.12.2021. Mr. Hameedullah Dahri, Advocate for appellants. Mr. Nazar Muhammad Memon, Additional P.G. Complainant is present in person. = By consent, Sessions Case No.72 of 2021 (Re: The State v. Muhammad Bux and others) bearing Crime No.01 of 2021 registered at P.S Khuda Abad under sections 324, 504, 337-H(ii), 147, 148, 149 PPC is hereby withdrawn from the file of learned Ist Additional Sessions Judge, Dadu and is transferred to Additional Sessions Judge, Sehwan with direction to expedite the matter and dispose it of in accordance with law within a period of three months. This Transfer Application is disposed of accordingly. JUDGE Shahid
